active_board.description: Emmett Barnes is a developmental WR prospect ranked No. 409 nationally. The Contested Specialist archetype and size not fully verified profile suggest a receiving target. Before assigning major resources, verify speed, separation, catching, release. Recruiting value should be weighed against Rutgers' current depth, on-field progress, and future departures.
